name: Clean State Gaming
tagline: Disable everything non-essential · keep only the game + anti-cheat alive
description: Bundles 12 service kills + 13 telemetry scheduled tasks + HID priority boost + game-process priority bump. Built around the canonical safe-disable list (BlackViper-era research, Raphire/Win11Debloat, djdallmann GamingPCSetup). Hard-excludes anything anti-cheat needs (CryptSvc, BFE, MpsSvc, AudioSrv, MMCSS, Dnscache, Dhcp, EventLog, RpcSs, DcomLaunch). After applying, run /diagnostics → DPC card → save baseline before, re-measure after, see the actual delta.
